review_title: Best way to see Mostar and Kravice
review: This was my best decision.  It was a small group tour - only 7 of us. Best combinaton of professionalism and relaxation.  The owner came ahead of the tour van on his scooter - in case the driver couldn't get close.   The driver/guide, Disco, was fabulous.  He had a great energy and sense of humour and was caring to everyone equally.   He zipped up through the border control and got us to the best access points ahead of the crowds and big buses.  In Mostar he introduced us to a recommended restaurant that would accept credit cards as well as to a shop owner.  All of the advice he provided played out exactly as he described.  The info he gave us enroute was really interesting and fresh - not the usual "canned" guide.   I can sincerely recommend this to anyone who dreads the big group idea but can't afford a personal guide.  This was honestly the best combination.

review_title: This is why you should choose a tour by van
review: I highly recommend this small-group (8 pax or less) tour by van as compared to a large group by bus. Firstly, it cuts the time taken to get through border security. Note that EES is implemented at the Croatian side, so multiply 1 min of facial recognition by x-number of tourists and you see how much time is spent at the border. Furthermore, cars and vans use a separate lane from tour buses. Secondly, a smaller vehicle allows travelling on smaller roads, which led us to the waterfall in a third of the time the large buses took. Even though this tour would cost more, it is definitely worth the time saved. Bruno was a wonderful guide and driver, sharing the history of both Croatia and BiH throughout the journey. He made a well-informed decision of visiting the waterfalls first to avoid the crowds. We were very grateful as, within an hour of our arrival at the waterfall, hordes of tour buses (likely compounded by the arrival of cruise ships) with hundreds of tourists decended in the small area. Bruno also provided clear instructions on where to meet and the drive was smooth, despite the bumpy BiH roads. There was also a seemless hotel pickup and drop off by Novak, to meet up with the main van, as we stayed in a hotel at Sombreno. Overall, we couldn’t have asked for anything more from this tour!

review_title: Kravice waterfalls and Mostar semi private tour
review: An excellent day out. The Kravice waterfalls are the prettiest waterfalls I have seen, certainly worth a visit. It was a bit too cold weather wise so although we had our bathers we didn’t go for a swim but definitely take them with you. The water looked very appealing. Mostar was a pretty little village. Mainly gift shops. Had a fabulous traditional lunch on the terrace by the river and went up the minaret of the mosque. Well worth it for the view.I would definitely recommend a semi private tour as this made passing through boarder control so much quicker and easier. We saw passengers from a large tour bus standing in a queue for passport control and then baggage check. Neither queue wasn’t moving very quickly at all.Our driver Marko was brilliant, so knowledgeable having grown up in the area, certainly made the trip. Drove through the local roads so we got to see more of the countryside too. Also we had an early start so we missed all the crowds at the waterfalls.I would recommend the trip. Definitely a semi private tour worth the extra money. Laus travel gets my seal of approval

Absolutely amazing experience. Our guide was Bruno who is a credit to the company. Informative, knowledgeable, engaging and friendly. Small group of 7 people enjoyed a fantastic day. Vehicle was spotless with good air con. Quick collections in the morning from 3 hotels. We were early enough to have the waterfalls all to ourselves. Stunning photos before the hoarded of buses and crowds. Mostar was a dream. Lovely food, market, boat ride (additional 10 euro on the river if you want to do this - takes 10 mins), views & people. Prices extremely cheap. No issues with border crossings - straight through with no delays. 10/10 trip and highlight of our holiday. If you have a day that you think “Will I do this or that” - don’t hesitate to book this trip - you won’t regret it

Amazing day trip! Our guide Disco was really knowledgeable and entertaining, and gave tips of what to do at the locations visited. The waterfall was beautiful though we were sadly not brave/ crazy enough to swim (despite our son's insistence otherwise)! Mostar was stunning too, and we found a restaurant on the river edge serving local wine and beer  :-). We found the war photo museum in our time there, which was a very moving record of horrible recent history - including the destruction of the iconic old bridge. The drive back through the Bosnian mountains, and quick stop in the "Bosnian Riviera" was also a highlight. Overall it was a great day, and going as a small group (6 of us plus Disco) made the day really easy and border crossing as painless as possible!

review_title: Mostar was very pretty and the falls are beautiful.
review: Bruno was our Driver, lots of information and History.  He made the journey really interesting and interactive.  There wasn’t anything he didn’t know about the areas we were travelling through.  Even the border crossing was a doddle.   The waterfalls were really quiet when we got there and he even advised us to take the long way round for better photos.  ( which was good advice).  Never felt rushed and felt very well informed in relation to everywhere we visited.  He had even sorted out a three course meal with a local restaurant in Mostar, at a special rate, if we wanted it.  Personally we didn’t eat there as I’m vegetarian and it was very meat based,  and I really don’t have a large enough appetite for three courses.  But from what I heard from the others on our tour it’s delicious.  Being a semi private tour meant there were only six of us.  I can highly recommend

review_title: Best day trip experience with Matteo!
review: We had a fantastic trip visiting the Kravica waterfalls and the city of Mostar. Our guide Matteo was so knowledgeable about the culture and history. We learned a lot on our trip and he was both funny and interesting to listen to. His driving was great too. Border crossing was super easy only around 5 minutes or so both ways since we were in a van. Buses take much longer since every person on a bus has to get out and get their face scanned when going through the Croatia Border control. We also started our day very efficiently by getting picked up by a separate driver and meeting the group at close meetup location so that our time wasn’t wasted going to multiple different hotels to get each member of our group. Our day trip to the Herzegovina region of the country with Matteo was one of the highlights of our vacation.  Highly recommend this tour with Matteo!

MARKO! What a man. This guide made our trip to Bosnia and Herzegovina (see Marko we remember) absolutely unforgettable. Our group of 5 girls went to Croatia to celebrate graduating from CU Boulder. We made the best decision when we, drum roll pleaseeee… decided to book this tour. Let me tell you, this excursion was the most fun experience of our lives. Marko’s driving was superb. He made sure we were safe and comfortable throughout the entire trip. We quickly got through border control and started the day at the Kravice, little cow, (see Marko we remember) waterfalls. While driving through BIH we learned about their culture, history, and traditions. Marko recommended places for lunch with clean bathrooms (see Marko we remember). He even stopped to jump someone (good job Marko). Marko was an absolute gem. He told us which places were the best and gave us amazing tips and tricks to walk around the waterfalls/city. I would be lying if I said that Marko didn’t make a lasting impact on all 5 of our lives. Thank you Marko for making this experience unforgettable and I hope that Donald Jamal is doing well!

review_title: Fantastic Day Trip to Mostar & Waterfalls – A Must Do
review: We had an amazing day trip from Dubrovnik to the waterfalls and Mostar — definitely one of the highlights of our holiday!Our guide, Disco, was fantastic. He was really knowledgeable, friendly, and made the whole experience feel relaxed and enjoyable. The day was paced perfectly, with plenty of time to take everything in without feeling rushed, and he looked after the group throughout.The waterfalls were absolutely beautiful — such a peaceful spot and well worth the visit. The drive itself was also incredibly scenic, so even the journey felt like part of the experience.Mostar is a must-see. It’s such a unique and historic place, and we’re so glad we made the trip over from Dubrovnik. I’d highly recommend this tour to anyone visiting the area!

review_title: Self-guided, without the stress of driving!
review: This trip was excellent, highly recommend. Marko, our tour guide, was amazing - he helped in making the excursion what it was. Extremely informative (these are his childhood stomping grounds!), engaging, and respectful. He got us thru the border quickly, & to the waterfalls before the crowds of busses arrived. Gave us excellent advice, and then allowed us to wander on our own. Same in Mostar, armed us with information and we explored on our own. Loved it!! He made the drive seem shorter by sharing stories about the area. 10/10 Sign up!!!!

Miodrag was great from start to finish. Made the trip very enjoyable with lots of stories. Very enthusiastic. Made crossing the border a breeze. Overall a very fun day out with great food, company, history & architecture ????

review_title: Excellent day and two beautiful sites
review: What a great trip.  Our tour guide Bruno was so experienced and knew how to navigate our trip so we had the most time at the sites.  We got through border patrol so quickly and made it to the Waterfalls before anyone.  We had the place to ourselves.  Then on to Mostar.   It was very pretty and Bruno’s recommendation for lunch was great.  While in the van he educated us on the region, the history and the current events.  What a great trip.

Edi was our guide and he was fantastic: incredibly knowledgeable, cheerful, and always made an effort to include everyone in the group. We first visited the beautiful Kravice Waterfalls, which were absolutely stunning and well worth the trip.We then crossed into Bosnia and Herzegovina, where Edi took us to a local restaurant for lunch. The meal was really good value, with soup, salad and a main course included. Afterwards, we had free time to explore Mostar at our own pace – such a beautiful and charming city to wander around.Edi truly made the day special. He was warm, engaging and thoughtful throughout, and even surprised us with a small gift at the end of the tour. A brilliant experience from start to finish!

Absolutely amazing day. From the time we were picked up to the time that we were dropped off our tour leader Miodrag was super helpful, friendly and extremely informative.  He gave us historical information  on Croatia as we were leaving Dubrovnik and the same for Bosnia as we were entering. He also pointed out points of interest along the way. Miodrag went above the call of duty and arranged for an item that I had left in a cafe in Mostar to be picked up and dropped back at our hotel. Thank you!!The waterfalls were breathtaking and so glad that we were there early to beat the crowds.Mostar was a charming town with plenty to see and do. The perfect place for lunch.

review_title: Excellent trip to Kravice Waterfalls and Mostar
review: Matteo was a wonderful guide along the way to  Kravice and Mostar. He was friendly, knowledgeable, and a great guide. The waterfalls were beautiful and the of Mostar is a must see. Matteo shared a wealth of information along the way and entertained a wide variety of questions. Conversation was easy. There were six people on our trip, which is the perfect size for a little adventure like this. Highly recommend!

We had a wonderful trip with our amazing tour guide, Disco! The drive was beautiful. The waterfalls were worth the visit! Mostar was such a cool city, very friendly people, good food and shopping. Disco made our experience 5 stars! He was full of history knowledge, very funny and easy going! Highly recommend!

We had an amazing day trip from Dubrovnik. Our guide, Bruno was great! He navigated a quiet border crossing to save time and got us to Kravice Waterfalls so early that we literally had the place to ourselves. When we were leaving it was starting to get busy.We spent 3 hours in Mostar, which was the perfect amount of time to explore. Throughout the day, Bruno shared some really great insights into the history of both Croatia and Bosnia. He’s a lovely guy and made the trip feel personal and easy.Highly recommend this tour.

Very efficient and well run tour. Disco the guide was very informative and had a good sense of humour. We crossed the border with ease  due to the small group of around 8 and had a lovely time at Mostar and the waterfalls. We left out accommodation around 7AM and were back around 4:30PM.

From the start to the end Miodrag was great. Arriving early friendly and very informative on the long drive with details of the history. Gave good tips and hints at each venue and even went above and beyond getting a mislaid item picked up and returned to us the next day. Can’t recommend enough supper guide and host

We loved our day trip from Dubrovnik to Bosnia. Miodrag was an incredible guide and was very knowledgeable on the entire Balkan region, presenting a good balance of history, culture, and personal anecdotes. He also timed the tour perfectly so that we had very little wait at both border crossings and had just enough time at Kravice Falls and in Mostar. This was a great value!

review_title: Fantastic day trip with local stories
review: Our visit to Bosnia í Herzegovina (BIH!) was fantastic! Our guide, Marko, was friendly, a good driver, and full of informative stories including of his childhood in the area. He took us in a loop route where we got to see more countryside, beat the buses to the Falls, and get the perfect table to view the Old Bridge in Mostar. Our group was small which worked out perfectly for fast border crossings, breaks, and conversations. I would highly recommend the semi-private tour.

Fantastic trip! Bruno our guide was so friendly, knowledgeable and informative. He made us feel relaxed and made sure everything ran smoothly.Arrived at Kravice before the crowds which meant some amazing photos.Onwards to Mostar where Bruno recommended an amazing restaurant where we tried traditional Bosnian food. Definitely recommend small group tours as much easier and quicker to get through the borders. Thank you Bruno - A brilliant trip and worth doing if you are in a Dubrovnik.

Wonderful group. Our driver was DISCO. He was the absolute best gave us lots of history and showed us all the best places to go and personally introduced us to several vendors that took great care of us. If I could give more stars than five I would, he was great. Everybody on the bus had a wonderful time and all agreed that this was one of the best experiences they had had in Croatia. Thank you for hiring such wonderful tour guide that really added value to our vacation.

review_title: Fabulous tour and a great host!
review: Matteo was a fabulous guide, knowledgeable, friendly and very helpful.  The minibus was spotlessly clean and made the trip more enjoyable.  The waterfalls were incredible and a must see, we arrived early so had the space to ourselves too!  Mostar was fascinating and a great experience.  What a day! Would highly recommend this tour.  Thanks, Matteo

Fabulous day, the waterfall was breathtaking and we were the first to arrive so we were able to view and take photos without the crowdsMostar was worth a visit and perfect place to buy souvenirs Big shout out for Mateo, our driver and host who made the day even more enjoyable.  Friendly,  helpful and so knowledgeable.  Answered lots of our questions and we chattered most of the way there and back ,as my husband and I rode shotgun Definitely recommend the semi private tour, we'll worth the extra money  Thank you Mateo!??

Great tour with Marko - excellent guide with interesting perspectives and patience to answer our many questions. The waterfalls were spectacular. Marko made a side trip to an oyster farm on our return to Dubrovnik which capped a fantastic day. Marko is one of the best guides we experienced on this trip.

From start to finish this tour was excellent. We booked the small group tour (up to max of 8) and Bruno was our driver for the day, but he was so much more. Bruno shared lots of interesting information about the sights and Croatian history. We had approx an hour at the waterfall and then 3 hrs at Mostar. Going early meant we missed the crowds at the waterfall. Would highly recommend.

What a lovely few hours we have just had visiting Kravice waterfalls and Mostar. We were first picked up at our hotel (hotel cavtat) by the lovely Noah who took us to our meeting point to meet our driver and guide Disco. Disco was crazy funny and very knowledgeable. Kravice waterfalls were spectacular definetely a must see. We spent 1 hour here. We then went to Mostar which was a surreal experience knowing that this was once a war zone. Its now a lively bustling beautiful little village. We spent 3hrs here which is just the perfect amount of time.  We stopped for a bite to eat and picked up some souveneirs before meeting Disco to take us back to Dubrovnik to meet Noah to take us back to our hotel. We would highly recommend booking this trip which we booked via get your guide. Top Tip dont book to go with a coach load of people pay that little bit extra to go in a small group as this will save time at border control and dont forget your passports.P.S. wont let me upload photos

An absolute must-do day trip from Dubrovnik! Bruno, our tour guide was so incredibly knowledgeable and entertaining that we barely noticed the drive, and left knowing a lot more about the history and culture of the area.In Kravice pack a swimsuit, it's cold but you won't regret it. In Mostar visit the museum for the BEST view of the bridge and more great info.

Great side trip when visiting Croatia. The semi private tour is worth the extra cost to skip the line at the border. Our tour guide Marko is fantastic and a local so he knows his routes and history. Would highly recommend for a change of pace.
Mateo was a fabulous guide. So knowledgeable and funny. Really great driver, very safe. The destinations are spectacular. We would be very happy to book another trip with this company.

review_title: Awesome day trip to Kravice and Mostar
review: Amazing day trip to Kravice Waterfalls and Mostar! The scenery was stunning, the perfect mix of nature, history, and culture. Special shoutout to our guide Disco — super knowledgeable, funny, and kept the whole group energized throughout the day. He made the experience feel personal and unforgettable. Highly recommend this tour if you’re visiting Dubrovnik!

review_title: Mateo a competent driver and guide
review: We recommend Mateo, who was a competent driver and guide. Waterfalls and Mostar were interesting and attractive. We got historical information and personal angle.

I really enjoyed this tour! Mateo was very friendly and helpful, and explained a lot about the culture and history to us. The tour was a very efficient way to see both places and the whole day ran very smoothly. I would recommend booking with this company!
Great day even though we had overcast or rainy weather. Amazing waterfalls, mateo spoke to us a lot on the way and gave so much info on Bosnia and its history. Mostar was a great place.

We had an excellent trip. Our driver/host was Mateo who was friendly, knowledgeable, and very accommodating! It was the perfect time of the year to go to Mostar since it wasn’t too hot. It was a bit crowded and very touristy but the food and scenery was worth the trip.
Mateo was brilliantVery knowledgeable. Great driver. Great host.
Absolutely recommend this trip. Disco was friendly, knowledgeable. He was there when you needed him but also gave you space. Falls and Mostar were both beautiful, good enough time allocated for both
The trip was very nice.  Miodrag, our driver was friendly and kept the group in the car informed about the sights.  The waterfalls were beautiful.  Mostar was interesting.  Worth the visit.
Disco was a fantastic guide. He made the drive interesting with bits of history and explained sights along the way. The falls were exceptional as was Mostar!
Disco is the greatest of all time, he was an awesome guide very informative. It was very easy to get across the borders with him. Would recommend to anyone at anytime. Bosnia is also beautiful!

review_title: Great day trip to Herzegovina from Dubrovnik
review: Great day trip to Herzegovina from Dubrovnik led by our friendly and informative guide, Mateo. The trip was well organised, arriving at the waterfalls before the crowds and with plenty time to enjoy Mostar. Mateo provided lots of interesting information and made it a very memorable trip. Would definitely recommend to other travellers looking for a brief experience in Bosnia and Herzegovina while staying in Dubrovnik.
It was a great tour.  Disco was very helpful and very informative.  We had a fantastic time.

Fantastic day out to Mostar and the Kravice waterfall, we were driven and  looked after throughout the day by our guide Disco who was both incredibly knowledgable and entertaining. Highly recommended.

Scenic drive, the border crossing was simple and easy. Bruno was kind and helpful. The waterfalls were the highlight, we appreciated the early start so we got there before the big busses. Mostar is an interesting place… aside from a refurbished bridge, I don’t know how it’s such a tourist destination. We wanted to check another country off the map, so Bosnia was a quick trip from Croatia

review_title: A Nice Day trip from Dubrovnik.
review: We had an interesting day with our guide Miodrag. He shared a lot of local facts and personal experiences which made the trip more memorable.The waterfalls are beautiful and Mostar is definitely worth a visit.

We had a wonderful day trip to Kravice waterfalls and the old city of Mostar.  Our guide Miodrag was very friendly and knowledgeable.  He gave us a lot of information about the places we visited. I would highly recommend this trip.

review_title: Great trip to Mostar from Dubrovnik.
review: Great experience with Laus operator and specially with the tour guide a driver Miodrag.  Very knowledgeable and friendly.  We would recommend this private tour for small group to Mostar and Kravice from Dubrovnik.

review_title: A Must Do Trip in Dubrovnik
review: Had a fantastic trip to Mostar and Kravice Falls. Marko the guide was very  knowledgeable, friendly and very entertaining and was a good driver. Would recommend this trip to anybody.

review_title: Great day out with a local guide
review: Mario was a fantastic guide for what was a very relaxed tour. He had plenty of local knowledge with plenty of tips for the places we visited. Highly recommended for a fun day visiting a beautiful country.
